message:
chore: refresh benchmark artifacts, update contract status, and sync beads

RaptorQ Track F wavefront pipeline benchmark data refreshed with
current measurement results across all K values and batch sizes.

Expected loss decision contract: E5 bead status corrected from
in_progress to open to match actual tracker state.

Beads issue tracker synced with latest audit and fix work.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
